ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the software product (e.g., mobile, web, desktop) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "development_status" TEXT /* Current development status of the product (e.g., in-development, released, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software product */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the software product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "major_release" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a major release */,
  "minor_release" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a minor release */,
  "patch_release" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a patch release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changelogs" (
  "changelog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each changelog entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change was made to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change type */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("changelog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changelogs_change_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_type_id") REFERENCES change_types ("change_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changelogs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_types" (
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change type */,
  "change_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the change type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change type */,
  "change_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the change type (e.g., bug, feature, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "database_version" TEXT /* Version of the database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string for the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_updates" (
  "database_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database update */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., schema change, data migration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_updates_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., development, QA, management) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., database, file, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "resource_changed" TEXT /* Resource being changed (e.g., database, file, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., admin, read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
